shell_interpreter_command_string.note: Shell command strings need explicit local review.

dependency_install_or_update.note: Dependency mutation should be reviewed before local trust.

shell_interpreter_command_string.note: Strict local mode blocks shell command strings unless a future adapter adds a stronger approval path.

dependency_install_or_update.note: Dependency mutation cannot be silently trusted in strict local mode.

environment_dump.note: Environment dumps can expose credentials and are blocked in strict local mode.

shell_interpreter_command_string.note: CI should not accept shell command strings without a repository-specific exception.

destructive_git_operation.note: CI should fail packets that recorded destructive git operations.

dependency_install_or_update.note: CI records dependency mutation as a review gate instead of silently trusting it.
